report_date_basis: Cowork dashboard report date follows receipt/publication date; underlying business data represents the prior day.
source: Public ESPN RSS + Yahoo Sports RSS feeds

source_detail.yahoo_news_sports: excluded for v0.2 because quick validation showed lower relevance and higher safety/noise risk than Yahoo Sports RSS.

items.headline: Sankey: SEC breakaway talk over college bill real

items.headline: Mizzou's Hardy medically cleared after being shot

items.headline: OU's Mateer back at full strength from hand injury...
items.detail: Oklahoma QB John Mateer said the mental toll he suffered after a hand injury temporarily derailed his season last year was "the hardest thing" he's ever done, but he's now at full strength and has returned to his pre-injury throwing motion.

items.headline: Messi sends heartfelt thanks to Argentina fans

items.headline: Pirates' Santana irked by Caballero in Yanks' win
items.detail: The New York Yankees' offense awoke from its struggles with eight runs in a win over the Pittsburgh Pirates on Monday, but fireworks erupted in the eighth inning when the benches cleared after Jose Caballero irritated Dennis Santana.
